channel.title: FilmyChill — New Movies & OTT This Week in the US
channel.description: What's worth watching this week in the US — new theatre and OTT releases with ratings and verdicts. Updated twice daily.

item.title: The Boys — Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video · English · ★ 8.4 · Must watch — A group of vigilantes known informally as “The Boys” set out to take down corrupt superheroes with no more than blue-collar grit and a willingness to fight…

item.title: Enola Holmes 3 — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · English · ★ 7.0 · Worth a watch — Adventure follows detective Enola Holmes to Malta, where her plans to tie the knot unravel when Sherlock's disappearance plunges her into a perilous case.

item.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation — Hulu
item.description: Hulu · Japanese · ★ 8.5 · Must watch — When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every…

item.title: Silo — Apple TV
item.description: Apple TV · English · ★ 8.2 · Must watch — In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously,…

item.title: X-Men '97 — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · English · ★ 8.6 · Must watch — The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a…

item.title: Deprisa, deprisa — Criterion Channel
item.description: Criterion Channel · Spanish · Not enough ratings yet

item.title: The Bear — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · English · ★ 8.1 · Must watch — Carmy, a young fine-dining chef, comes home to Chicago to run his family sandwich shop. As he fights to transform the shop and himself, he works alongside a…

item.title: Supergirl — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.2 · Decent one-time watch — When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an…

item.title: Minions & Monsters — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.4 · Decent one-time watch — This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters…

item.title: House of the Dragon — HBO Max Amazon Channel
item.description: HBO Max Amazon Channel · English · ★ 8.4 · Must watch — The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights.

item.title: Voicemails for Isabelle — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 8.4 · Must watch — A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.

item.title: Citizen Vigilante — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.6 · Worth a watch — A man takes justice into his own hands, hunting down criminals. His vigilante crusade makes him a social media star but puts him at odds with the local police…

item.title: Oasis — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Spanish · ★ 6.6 · Worth a watch — Oasis is the most luxurious holiday resort in the country — a paradise reserved for the wealthiest families, featuring private beaches, VIP facilities, and…

item.title: Ultras: Passion and Death — HBO Max
item.description: HBO Max · Spanish · Not enough ratings yet — Ultras: Passion and Death is an HBO docuseries that explores the violent and deeply rooted Spanish "ultras" football fan movement by examining three specific…

item.title: Toy Story 5 — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.4 · Worth a watch — When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they…

item.title: Romería — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Spanish · ★ 6.5 · Worth a watch — With her mother's diary in hand, Marina's search for official documents for university leads her to her biological family on the Atlantic coast.
